data.title: Civil Engineer
data.description: Komagin Limited is seeking a qualified Civil Engineer to join our growing project delivery team in Port Moresby. The successful candidate will be responsible for planning, designing, and supervising civil and structural engineering works across subdivision development, infrastructure, and building construction projects. You will work closely with project managers and site supervisors to ensure technical standards and client expectations are met.
data.requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Civil or Structural Engineering (or equivalent)
- Minimum 3 years post-graduate experience in civil/structural engineering
• Registered or eligible for registration with the PNG Engineering Board
• Proficiency in AutoCAD, Civil 3D, or equivalent design software
• Strong understanding of PNG construction standards and building codes
• Excellent communication and report writing skills
• Valid PNG driving licence and willingness to work on site
